visual_description: The video opens on a very dark, blurry, and shaky shot. The audio is a chaotic and intense soundscape of a violent confrontation. It begins with a loud, percussive thud, followed by a high-pitched, screeching sound that suggests a powerful, aggressive action. The camera moves erratically, as if handheld and in a state of chaos. In the upper right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The environment is almost entirely black, punctuated by a few out-of-focus, warm, yellowish lights in the distance, creating a sense of a dark, enclosed space. The camera pans and tilts, revealing a chaotic scene in near-total darkness. A large, muscular, humanoid figure is seen from a high angle, seemingly falling or being thrown amidst a tangle of what appears to be vines or branches. The figure is mostly in shadow, but its form is discernible. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper right. The camera continues its shaky, disorienting movement, briefly focusing on the back of the large, muscular figure.
